title: Add support for `Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Copy.AllowEmptyWildcard`
body:
Tracks the `Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Copy.AllowEmptyWildcard` item from https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/6732

Add support for controlling whether zero glob matches is treated as an error during copy operations, aligning with BuildKit's `FileActionCopy.AllowEmptyWildcard`. This adds a flag to allow empty results to succeed silently.                                                                                                            

Tasks:
- Add `AddAndCopyOptions.AllowEmptyWildcard` (type: `types.OptionalBool`), default true
- Add `copier.StatOptions.AllowEmptyWildcard`
- Add `copier.GetOptions.AllowEmptyWildcard`                                                                                    
- Add unit tests in copier package                                                                                              
- Add `--allow-empty-wildcard` to `buildah add` and `buildah copy`, default false                                               
- Add integration tests
